identity

Platform engineer focused on cloud delivery that holds up in production.

Based in Casablanca, I work at Oracle on multi-tenant OCI platforms across Terraform, CI/CD, secure networking, observability, data pipelines, release management, cost optimization, and AI/MLOps enablement.

Where I work best

Architecture, delivery, and production ownership in one loop.

Ambiguous platform problems where cloud architecture, delivery automation, production ownership, and incident learning need to become one repeatable operating model.

Cloud platform

Builds OCI foundations, secure network paths, data services, and runtime changes that can move safely across environments.

Production operations

Handles the practical reliability work: monitoring, incident response, release checks, rollback planning, and support.

Automation

Turns repeated infrastructure and delivery tasks into Terraform modules, CI/CD workflows, runbooks, and cleaner release routines.

platform portfolio

Outcome-first platform work.

Public-safe snapshots of what I owned, what changed, and why it mattered.

Platform architecture

Enterprise OCI Landing Zone Runway

Cloud runway

Role

Architect + operator

Stack

OCI / Terraform

Outcome

Safer changes

Outcome

Protected 500+ OCI resources per environment and made platform changes safer to review, promote, and operate.

Owned

Owned Terraform boundaries, IAM guardrails, environment promotion gates, and reviewable release paths.

Challenge

Cloud environments needed repeatable change without drift, resource recreation, or unclear ownership.

OCITerraformIAMVCNRelease Management

Cloud security

Secure Network And Identity Edge

Private edge

Role

Network + identity

Stack

Gateway / Traefik

Outcome

Private edge

Outcome

Improved routing clarity, security posture, and release confidence for private application paths.

Owned

Owned controlled OCI traffic paths with load balancing, API gateways, NSGs, TLS, Traefik, functions, and authN/authZ.

Challenge

Applications, APIs, databases, functions, and third-party identity paths needed predictable private connectivity.

OCI NetworkingAPI GatewayLoad BalancerTraefikAuthN/AuthZ

Cloud migration

Tenancy And Data Migration

Safe cutover

Role

Migration lead

Stack

OCI / ADB

Outcome

Controlled cutover

Outcome

Reduced migration risk by making ownership, access, data continuity, rollback, and post-migration validation explicit.

Owned

Owned target OCI landing-zone planning, Terraform state-safe migration, IAM and networking dependency mapping, data movement, validation, and cutover checks.

Challenge

Platform workloads and data needed to move between cloud tenancies without breaking access, security, or continuity.

OCIIAMNetworkingObject StorageAutonomous DatabaseTerraform

Production reliability

Observability And Reliability Fabric

Signals as code

Role

Reliability owner

Stack

Logs / Grafana

Outcome

Faster triage

Outcome

Improved incident detection, triage speed, and operational visibility across production environments.

Owned

Owned logging, metrics, event rules, alarms, dashboards, and runbooks as repeatable platform patterns.

Challenge

Production services needed clearer signals for incidents, capacity, data freshness, and service health.

OCI LoggingOCI MonitoringGrafanaEventsAlarms

Role

MLflow / Data Flow

Outcome

AI-ready base

Outcome

Enabled AI-ready workflows with controlled execution, artifact flow, logging, and delivery governance.

Owned

Owned private foundations with OCI Data Science, MLflow, OCIR, Object Storage, MySQL, Data Flow, and Spark.

Challenge

Data and ML workloads needed repeatable training, model tracking, private execution, and artifact flow.

OCI Data ScienceMLflowData FlowSparkMySQLTerraform

career timeline

2023 - Present

DevOps Engineer II / Platform Engineer, Oracle

Owned OCI architecture, Terraform migration, OKE, releases, observability, and MLOps-ready foundations.

2023

Research Assistant, Oracle

Delivered backend and CI/CD workflows across Java, Groovy, Gradle, Jenkins, and GitLab.

2022

Full Stack Developer, diaaland

Built product workflows and third-party integrations across backend, database, and React frontend.

2021

Web Developer, INTELLCAP SARL

Delivered marketplace-style web functionality across React, GraphQL, PHP, and WooCommerce.

proof of work

Compact signals across architecture, migration, delivery, reliability, and MLOps.

OCI landing zones

OCI + IAMADB

state-safedata continuity
🔐

secure ingressprivate routing

dashboardsfaster triage
